join_order.notes: sub_adsh_hash is 4MB — fully cache-resident. Probe num adsh_code; verify fy==2023; read name_code.

join_order.probe: surviving num rows after sub join (~6.3M)
join_order.notes: pre_triple_hash is 512MB — exceeds LLC. Issue madvise(MADV_WILLNEED) at query start. Multi-value: scan forward while (adsh,tag,ver) match. Filter stmt==is_code. Read plabel_code.

filters.encoding: int16_t dict-encoded; resolve usd_code from uom_dict.txt at runtime
double IEEE 754; NaN sentinel for NULL
int32_t raw; INT32_MIN sentinel for NULL
int16_t dict-encoded; resolve is_code from stmt_dict.txt at runtime

data_structures.sub_join: pre_built_mmap_hash(sub_adsh_hash, 262144 slots, 16B/slot = 4MB) — cache-resident, zero build cost
data_structures.pre_join: pre_built_mmap_hash(pre_triple_hash, 33554432 slots, 16B/slot = 512MB) — madvise WILLNEED at start
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local_open_addressing_hash_map(AGG_CAP=131072, slot=48B) — 64 threads × 131072 × 48B = ~384MB total; partitioned merge post-scan
data_structures.aggregation_key: Q6Key { int32_t name_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t plabel_code; int16_t stmt_code; int16_t _pad; } — ALL 4 GROUP BY dimensions (C15, C30)
data_structures.aggregation_value: Q6Group { int64_t sum_cents; int64_t count; } — C29: SUM as int64_t cents
data_structures.topk: std::partial_sort on global result vector, k=200 — O(n log k)

aggregation.memory_budget_decision: total_agg_mem (384MB) > LLC (44MB); T×G = 64×50000 = 3.2M > 2M → use partitioned merge: P=64 partitions, each thread drains its owned partition post-scan
aggregation.sum_precision: int64_t cents — C29 HARD CONSTRAINT: iv = llround(v * 100.0); sum_cents += iv

parallelism.scan_target: num (39.4M rows) — split into ~394 morsels of 100K rows each
parallelism.thread_local_state: each thread: AGG_CAP-slot open-addressing hash map for partial aggregation
parallelism.merge_phase: partitioned merge — 64 partitions, one thread per partition, fully parallel, zero contention

indexes.slot_struct: SubADSHSlot { int32_t adsh_code; int32_t row_id; int32_t _pad0; int32_t _pad1; }

indexes.purpose: join_lookup — map (num.adsh_code, num.tag_code, num.version_code) → pre first_row_id
indexes.slot_struct: PreTripleSlot { int32_t adsh_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t ver_code; int32_t row_id; }
indexes.multi_value: scan forward from first_row while (adsh,tag,ver) match; filter stmt==is_code

io_prefetch.implementation: #pragma omp parallel sections — P27: concurrent madvise for all large index files

correctness_rules.C15_C30: Q6Key MUST contain all 4 GROUP BY dimensions: name_code, stmt_code, tag_code, plabel_code
correctness_rules.C24: ALL hash table probes use bounded for-loop: probe < cap
correctness_rules.C29: SUM accumulates as int64_t cents via llround(v*100.0); output as sum/100 + abs(sum%100)
correctness_rules.C31: ALL string outputs double-quoted: name (commas), stmt, tag, plabel (commas)
correctness_rules.C32: pre_triple_hash header (pth_cap, pth_mask, pth_ht) declared at run_query() function scope
correctness_rules.C33: Sort comparator: primary=sum_cents DESC, secondary=name_code ASC (stable tiebreaker)
